title: National Family Health Survey 1 (1992–93)
keyVariables: fertility; family planning; mortality; maternal health
bestFor: Historical baseline for modern Indian health analysis
limitations: Older geography and modules; not district-representative like NFHS-4/5
exampleUses: Long-run fertility and MCH trend reconstruction

title: National Family Health Survey 2 (1998–99)
keyVariables: fertility; nutrition; family planning; health care
bestFor: Reproductive and child health studies spanning the late 1990s
limitations: State-level focus; limited biomarker modules vs later waves
exampleUses: Comparing RCH indicators before and after NRHM

title: National Family Health Survey 3 (2005–06)
keyVariables: HIV testing; fertility; nutrition; women’s status
bestFor: Public-health and nutrition work needing HIV and women’s status modules
limitations: Pre-district-estimate era for many indicators
exampleUses: HIV prevalence and gender-health intersection analysis

title: National Family Health Survey 4 (2015–16)
keyVariables: district indicators; child growth; sanitation; biomarkers
bestFor: District-comparable health and nutrition baselines before NFHS-5
limitations: Single wave; biomarkers subset by design
exampleUses: District health dashboards and inequality maps

title: National Family Health Survey 5 (2019–21)
keyVariables: fertility; ANC; immunization; BMI; anemia; blood pressure; glucose; district IDs
bestFor: Flagship modern district-level household health source
limitations: Licensed microdata; multi-year fieldwork complicates single-year claims
exampleUses: District development, maternal-child health, NCD screening analyses

title: District Level Household Survey 1 (1998–99)
keyVariables: reproductive health; family planning; district indicators
bestFor: Early district-oriented RCH program evidence
limitations: Historical access paths are fragmented
exampleUses: Program history of district RCH monitoring

title: District Level Household Survey 2 (2002–04)
keyVariables: service use; reproductive health; child health
bestFor: District-level RCH evidence in the early 2000s
limitations: Documentation quality varies by archive

title: District Level Household Survey 3 (2007–08)
keyVariables: MCH indicators; family planning; service quality
bestFor: All-district RCH comparisons around NRHM expansion
limitations: Superseded for current work by NFHS-4/5

title: District Level Household Survey 4 (2012–13)
technicalTags: household survey; microdata; district-level; facility survey
keyVariables: district health indicators; facility-linked measures
bestFor: Pairing with AHS/NFHS for district health triangulation
limitations: Coverage and modules differ from NFHS
exampleUses: District facility and household dual-track analysis

title: Health Management Information System (HMIS)
keyVariables: births; deaths; immunization; patient counts; drug stocks; infrastructure
bestFor: High-frequency routine health reporting and facility service use
limitations: Administrative quality varies; not a probability sample

title: Sample Registration System Statistical Reports
keyVariables: CBR; CDR; IMR; age composition
bestFor: Official fertility and mortality rates for states
limitations: PDF-first packaging; limited microdata

title: Civil Registration System Vital Statistics
keyVariables: registered births; registered deaths; infant deaths; sex ratios
bestFor: Civil registration completeness and vital-statistics benchmarks
limitations: Registration completeness uneven across states

title: Longitudinal Ageing Study in India (Wave 1)
keyVariables: health; cognition; work; family support; community modules
bestFor: National aging, health, and economic support for 45+
limitations: Registration-dependent access; Wave 1 is baseline only

title: LASI Diagnostic Assessment of Dementia (LASI-DAD)
keyVariables: cognitive tests; informant interview; geriatric assessment; biomarkers
bestFor: Dementia and cognitive-aging research
limitations: DUA required; subsample of LASI
exampleUses: Cognitive impairment prevalence and risk factors

title: Unified District Information System for Education Plus
keyVariables: school profile; infrastructure; teachers; enrolment; exam results
bestFor: Core school-system infrastructure and enrolment mapping
limitations: Microdata often requires request; administrative quality varies
exampleUses: School facility gaps and GER/NER style tracking

title: All India Survey on Higher Education
keyVariables: teachers; enrolment; programmes; finance; infrastructure
bestFor: Institution-level higher education system statistics
limitations: Less granular on learning outcomes than school assessments
exampleUses: University capacity, GER in higher education

title: National Achievement Survey 2021
keyVariables: test scores; pupil questionnaire; school questionnaire; teacher questionnaire
bestFor: Strongest official learning-outcome assessment at district scale
limitations: Periodic not annual; sample design constraints
exampleUses: Learning poverty and district performance comparisons

title: Annual Status of Education Report (ASER)
keyVariables: enrolment; reading; arithmetic; school report card items
bestFor: Independent rural learning assessment counterpoint to admin data
limitations: Primarily rural; tool differs from NAS

title: Periodic Labour Force Survey Annual 2023–24
keyVariables: WPR; LFPR; UR; industry; occupation; earnings; hours
bestFor: India’s baseline labor-market dataset
limitations: Registration for microdata; do not stack with pre-2017 EUS without redesign caveats

title: PLFS Quarterly / Calendar Year Releases
keyVariables: activity status; employment indicators; household files
bestFor: Short-term labor turning points
limitations: Not a substitute for July–June annual microdata; design refresh from 2025

title: Time Use Survey 2024
keyVariables: paid work; unpaid care; domestic services; learning; leisure
bestFor: Strongest official source for care and unpaid work
limitations: Episodic survey; not annual—compare carefully to 2019 TUS
exampleUses: Care economy and gender time allocation

title: Household Consumption Expenditure Survey 2022–23
keyVariables: MPCE; food items; non-food items; quantity/value
bestFor: Post-pandemic consumption benchmark
limitations: Methodological differences vs NSS 68th (2011–12) CES; multi-visit design
exampleUses: Welfare measurement and CPI weight research

title: Household Consumption Expenditure Survey 2023–24
keyVariables: MPCE fractiles; item quantity/value; food and non-food
bestFor: Essential welfare measurement and CPI weights
limitations: Registration required; large multi-level files; bridge carefully to 2011–12

title: India Human Development Survey I (2004–05)
keyVariables: health; education; employment; assets; caste; social capital
bestFor: Exceptionally broad multi-topic household baseline
limitations: Older wave; free academic registration
exampleUses: Caste, gender, education, and welfare intersections

title: India Human Development Survey II (2011–12)
keyVariables: income; consumption; agriculture; education; programs
bestFor: Medium-run panel analysis with IHDS-I
limitations: Pre-2010s labor market; not a substitute for PLFS
exampleUses: Household change over time and program access

title: CMIE Consumer Pyramids Household Survey
keyVariables: household panel; incomes; employment; consumption
bestFor: High-frequency private household panel for labor and welfare
limitations: Paid subscription; not open data

title: CMIE ProwessDX
keyVariables: P&L; balance sheet; ratios; share prices; corporate actions
bestFor: Company financials and listed-firm research
limitations: Paid; coverage skewed to formal/registered firms
exampleUses: Firm performance, leverage, and market studies

title: Annual Survey of Unincorporated Sector Enterprises 2023–24
keyVariables: establishment traits; output; value added; employment
bestFor: Unincorporated non-agricultural establishments and informal MSMEs
limitations: Registration; not factory-sector ASI; schedule differs from 67th/73rd

title: Annual Survey of Industries 2023–24
keyVariables: ownership; fixed assets; labor cost; inputs; outputs
bestFor: Standard organized manufacturing / factory sector analysis
limitations: Registered factories only; frame and NIC codes change across decades
exampleUses: Industrial structure, GVA, employment in factories

title: National Accounts Statistics
keyVariables: GDP; GVA; national income; sectoral aggregates
bestFor: Macro anchor for national and state analysis
limitations: Revisions and base-year changes require care

title: Index of Industrial Production
keyVariables: index; growth rate; category; base year
bestFor: Cyclical industry monitoring
limitations: Index not levels of output value

title: Consumer Price Index (Combined)
keyVariables: rural CPI; urban CPI; combined; groups/sub-groups
bestFor: Inflation, deflators, and household price pressure
limitations: Item detail depends on published breakdowns
exampleUses: Real wage and poverty line updates

title: Wholesale Price Index
keyVariables: commodity groups; linked base years; WPI/PPI
bestFor: Production-side inflation lens
limitations: Base-year links needed for long history

title: RBI Database on Indian Economy
keyVariables: real sector; financial markets; external sector; public finance
bestFor: Default reference for finance-facing macro series
limitations: Portal UX and series codes change over time
exampleUses: Banking, credit, and external sector charts

title: Agriculture Census 2015–16
keyVariables: operational holdings; size class; irrigation; tenancy; land use
bestFor: Canonical farm-structure baseline
limitations: Tables/reports more than unit-level microdata

title: Agriculture Census 2021–22
keyVariables: operational holdings; census process fields
bestFor: Newest agriculture-census cycle as tables roll out
limitations: Release completeness may lag by table

title: Input Survey 2016–17
keyVariables: fertilizers; pesticides; manures; irrigated crops
bestFor: Operational holding input-use evidence
limitations: Report-oriented packaging

title: Input Survey 2022–23
keyVariables: fertilizers; HYV seeds; pesticides; bio-inputs
bestFor: Technology and input use linked to latest census cycle
limitations: Outputs may arrive as manuals/reports first

title: Situation Assessment of Agricultural Households 2019
keyVariables: income; debt; assets; farming practices; schemes
bestFor: Essential farm household economics
limitations: Episodic (~decade spacing); concepts of farmer vs agricultural household change across rounds

title: Cost of Cultivation of Principal Crops
keyVariables: A2+FL; C2 costs; labor; machinery; fertilizer
bestFor: MSP analysis and crop economics
limitations: Lagged; complex cost constructs
exampleUses: Cost of production vs market prices

title: Agmarknet Mandi Prices
keyVariables: mandi; commodity; arrivals; min/modal/max price; date
bestFor: Daily agricultural price discovery
limitations: Coverage and quality vary by mandi/commodity

title: eNAM Trade Dashboard
keyVariables: APMC; commodity; prices; arrivals; traded quantity
bestFor: Electronic market integration research
limitations: Dashboard-first; not always bulk download friendly

title: Soil Health Card
keyVariables: N; P; K; S; micronutrients; organic carbon; pH; EC
bestFor: Nutrient and soil condition monitoring
limitations: Operational data quality and coverage vary

title: 6th Minor Irrigation Census
keyVariables: scheme type; ownership; holding size; utilization
bestFor: Village-level irrigation asset mapping
limitations: Census lag; not daily water levels

title: Crime in India
keyVariables: IPC/SLL cases; victims; crime type; state/UT
bestFor: Official annual crime reference
limitations: PDF tables; reporting artifacts across states

title: Prison Statistics India
keyVariables: capacity; occupancy; prisoner composition; staff
bestFor: Prison system monitoring series
limitations: PDF packaging

title: Accidental Deaths and Suicides in India
keyVariables: suicides; accidental deaths; causes; occupation
bestFor: Social risk and public safety mortality series
limitations: Cause coding and under-reporting caveats

title: National Judicial Data Grid
keyVariables: instituted; pending; disposed; case type; delay reasons
bestFor: Live judicial system observatory
limitations: Dashboard-first; bulk research extracts can be hard

title: ECI General Election Statistical Reports
keyVariables: electors; turnout; candidates; votes; winners
bestFor: Official parliamentary election results archive

title: ECI Assembly Election Statistical Reports
keyVariables: AC electors; turnout; parties; winners
bestFor: State politics and redistricting histories

title: MyNeta Candidate Affidavits
keyVariables: assets; liabilities; education; criminal cases; party
bestFor: Candidate-level transparency from affidavits

title: Lok Dhaba
keyVariables: results; constituency history; candidate/party trajectories
bestFor: Long-run legislative politics research dataset

title: IMD Gridded Rainfall
keyVariables: daily rainfall; lat-long grid; mm
bestFor: Standard national rainfall grid for hydro-climatic work

title: IMD Gridded Temperature
keyVariables: daily max temperature; daily min temperature

title: CPCB AQI / CAAQMS Repository

bestFor: Real-time and historical air pollution analytics

title: India-WRIS Reservoir Module
keyVariables: storage; level; inflow/outflow; location; date
bestFor: Daily water storage monitoring

title: CGWB Groundwater Level Monitoring
keyVariables: pre/post monsoon levels; station; quarter
bestFor: National groundwater network time series

title: CEA Installed Capacity Reports
keyVariables: installed MW; source; sector; state
bestFor: Official electricity capacity benchmark

title: National Power Portal / GRID-INDIA Daily Generation
keyVariables: generation; demand; transmission; source splits
bestFor: Public demand-generation snapshot for electricity operations

title: Road Accidents in India
keyVariables: accidents; deaths; injuries; road category; road user type
bestFor: Official road-safety series

title: PMGSY Dashboard
keyVariables: km; roads sanctioned/completed; habitations; financial progress
bestFor: All-weather rural road connectivity progress

title: DGCA Monthly Traffic Statistics
keyVariables: passengers; freight; mail; carrier traffic
bestFor: Domestic aviation traffic monitoring
limitations: PDF-first monthly packs

title: Jal Jeevan Mission Dashboard
keyVariables: households; tap connections; Har Ghar Jal status
bestFor: Rural tap-water service-delivery tracking

title: Swachh Bharat Mission–Grameen Dashboard
keyVariables: ODF Plus status; verification stages; GPs/villages
bestFor: Rural sanitation progress and ODF-Plus tracking

title: Census Primary Census Abstract 2011
keyVariables: population; sex; literacy; workers; SC/ST; households
bestFor: Small-area demographic base layer until next full PCA is fully available

title: District Census Handbook / Village Directory
keyVariables: amenities; roads; power; medical; education; households
bestFor: Rural amenities and settlement studies

title: Bhuvan Thematic Datasets
keyVariables: LULC; urban land use; wasteland; water bodies; flood layers
bestFor: India-wide thematic spatial layers for GIS workflows
limitations: Product-specific licenses and access steps
exampleUses: Land use change and hazard layers

title: Wastelands Atlas 2019
keyVariables: wasteland classes; 23 classes
bestFor: Land-degradation analysis
limitations: Atlas snapshot not continuous monitoring

title: geoBoundaries India
keyVariables: admin geometries; metadata; license
bestFor: Open-license administrative boundaries when official shapefiles are limited
limitations: Not an official Survey of India product

title: OpenStreetMap India Extract
keyVariables: roads; rail; water; POIs; routeable network
bestFor: Web maps, routing, and POI layers
limitations: Completeness varies by region and feature class

title: Landsat Collection 2
keyVariables: surface reflectance; QA bands; geometry
bestFor: Longest consistent Earth-observation record for land-change work
limitations: Cloud cover; large storage/compute
exampleUses: Urban growth and surface water change

title: Sentinel-2 Level-2A
keyVariables: 10m/20m/60m bands; scene metadata; geometry
bestFor: High-resolution optical workhorse for crops and cities
limitations: Clouds; account/service rules on Copernicus

title: UN Comtrade (Comtrade Plus) — India Merchandise Trade
technicalTags: bilateral trade; HS codes; open portal
geographyLevel: India as reporter/partner; bilateral; HS product
keyVariables: reporter/partner; HS commodity code; trade flow (import/export); value (USD); quantity / net weight
bestFor: Gold-standard HS-level bilateral merchandise trade with India as reporter or partner
limitations: Reporter–partner asymmetries; free API/download quotas; services trade is thinner than goods
exampleUses: India’s product–partner export baskets, China–India trade balances, HS-level gravity work

title: World Integrated Trade Solution (WITS) — India Profile
technicalTags: trade + tariffs; portal; UN Comtrade / TRAINS
keyVariables: exports / imports; trade balance; MFN and applied tariffs; partner and product shares; NTMs (via TRAINS modules)
bestFor: India trade + tariff + protection indicators in one interface built on Comtrade/TRAINS
limitations: Aggregations can differ from raw Comtrade; registration for bulk; not a substitute for DGCIS customs micro-detail
exampleUses: Tariff incidence on Indian imports; partner concentration; trade openness series

title: UNCTADstat Data Hub — India Trade & Development Indicators
institution: United Nations Conference on Trade and Development
keyVariables: merchandise and services trade; FDI; commodity prices; maritime / creative economy series; development indicators
bestFor: Cross-country UNCTAD series on India’s trade, investment, and structural development
limitations: Indicator level (not full HS micro-trade); definitions differ from MoSPI national accounts
exampleUses: India FDI inflows vs peers; services export growth; commodity price shocks

title: WTO Stats — Merchandise, Services & Tariffs (India)
keyVariables: merchandise trade; commercial services; bound / applied / preferential tariffs; regional integration indicators
bestFor: Official WTO-consistent India trade and tariff time series for policy and comparative work
limitations: More aggregated than Comtrade HS-6; services definitions follow BPM/EBOPS conventions
exampleUses: India tariff bindings vs applied rates; services trade balances

title: CEPII BACI — Reconciled Bilateral Trade (HS-6)
keyVariables: exporter i→j exports; HS-6 product; value and quantity; reconciled reporter/partner flows
bestFor: Academic gravity / network trade work needing reconciled India bilateral HS-6 flows
limitations: Not official Indian customs; lags live Comtrade; registration / license terms apply
exampleUses: India product-space / export sophistication; bilateral trade networks

title: DGCIS Foreign Trade Data Dissemination Portal (India)
institution: Directorate General of Commercial Intelligence and Statistics
timeCoverage: Contemporary monthly series (portal coverage expands over time)
keyVariables: exports / imports; principal commodities; partner country; customs zone; value and quantity
bestFor: Official Government of India merchandise trade statistics from the customs statistical authority
limitations: Portal UX/registration; principal-commodity free tier vs deeper paid/historical products historically
exampleUses: Official monthly Indian export/import tracking; commodity-wise EXIM

title: Department of Commerce TRADESTAT / EIDB (India EXIM)
timeCoverage: Recent fiscal years (portal shows multi-year span)
keyVariables: exports; imports; commodity-wise EXIM; country-wise EXIM; FTAs / preferential views (portal modules)
bestFor: Quick official EXIM tables by commodity and partner without full DGCIS micro extracts
limitations: Dashboard/query tool—not full research microdata; definitions follow Commerce presentation
exampleUses: Country-wise export shares; commodity group EXIM for briefings

title: World Bank World Development Indicators (India)
keyVariables: GDP and growth; trade % of GDP; poverty / social indicators; education and health aggregates; infrastructure series
bestFor: Cross-country macro and development series for India in a standard World Bank panel
limitations: National aggregates—not district microdata; some series lag or are modeled estimates
exampleUses: India vs peers dashboards; long-run growth and trade openness

title: IMF Direction of Trade Statistics (DOTS) — India
keyVariables: exports to partner; imports from partner; trade balance; period (month/year)
bestFor: Consistent IMF bilateral trade aggregates for India when HS product detail is not required
limitations: Not HS product-level; methodology differs from Comtrade/DGCIS; portal access rules apply
exampleUses: India bilateral trade balances with major partners over decades

title: ACLED — Armed Conflict Location & Event Data (India)
institution: Armed Conflict Location & Event Data Project
updateFrequency: Twice weekly (global); curated regional files weekly
timeCoverage: Asia coverage from ~2010s (check current India start date on portal)
keyVariables: event type / sub-event; actors; fatalities; location and admin names; dates; source notes
bestFor: Near real-time political violence, battles, riots, and protest events in India with coordinates
limitations: myACLED registration; media bias and coding rules; not a long 1950–90s communal-riot panel like Varshney–Wilkinson
exampleUses: District protest/violence trends; civilian targeting; election-period unrest

title: GDELT — Global Database of Events, Language, and Tone (India filter)
formats: BigQuery; raw CSV dumps; DOC 2.0 / GKG
geographyLevel: global including India; geocoded when available
keyVariables: CAMEO event codes; actors; Goldstein scale; tone; locations; source URLs
bestFor: High-frequency machine-coded news events mentioning India when volume and latency matter more than hand-coding
limitations: Huge files; false positives and media bias; not expert-validated like ACLED/UCDP; India extracts need careful filtering
exampleUses: Media-attention shocks; protest keyword spikes; cross-border event networks

title: UCDP Georeferenced Event Dataset (GED) — India coverage
keyVariables: event ID; date; latitude/longitude; deaths (best/low/high); side A / side B; conflict dyad IDs
bestFor: Academic standard for organized lethal violence events (state-based, non-state, one-sided) including India
limitations: Stricter fatality/organization thresholds than ACLED; slower than near-real-time monitors; not communal-riot census for 1950–95
exampleUses: Organized armed violence trends; spatial conflict econometrics

title: Global Terrorism Database (GTD) — India incidents
institution: National Consortium for the Study of Terrorism and Responses to Terrorism
timeCoverage: From 1970 (with known gaps e.g. 1993 in classic releases)
keyVariables: date; location; perpetrator group; attack type; target type; weapons; casualties
bestFor: Incident-level terrorism research with India as a high-volume country in the global GTD
limitations: Definition of terrorism; coding lags; registration; not a substitute for ACLED protest data or Varshney–Wilkinson communal riots
exampleUses: Naxal / separatist / communal terror incident counts; target-type analysis

title: EM-DAT International Disaster Database (India filter)
institution: Centre for Research on the Epidemiology of Disasters
keyVariables: disaster type; dates; deaths; affected population; damages; location
bestFor: Comparable international disaster event series for floods, cyclones, droughts, and quakes in India
limitations: Entry thresholds; damages often incomplete; not a substitute for IMD event meteorology
exampleUses: Disaster frequency/severity panels; climate impact correlators

title: Indian Census Data Collection, 1901–2026: Digitised Subnational Population and Administrative Datasets
keyVariables: state population; district population; subdistrict population; administrative identifiers
bestFor: Long-run harmonized subnational census and administrative geography for India

exampleUses: Historical demography and district panel construction

title: Population Estimates for Districts and Parliamentary Constituencies in India, 2020
